language.label: Language
language.title: Choose your language
language.description: Select the language of your book.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters

cover.tagline: Where game masters and players keep their stories.

login.title: Open your book
login.subtitle: Pick up your chronicle where you left off.

register.title: Begin a new book
register.subtitle: Every legend has a first chapter.

dashboard.opener: The pages ahead are still blank. Open your first campaign and the world will begin to take shape, entry by entry.

recent.title: Your most recent campaign
recent.tomeSubtitle: Your shelf holds no volumes yet
recent.tomeDescription: Every great chronicle begins with a blank page. When you create a campaign, it will rest here — ready to be resumed at any moment of the session.

campaigns.title: Your campaigns
campaigns.empty: No campaigns recorded yet. This book's index will fill in as you create your stories.

characters.title: Your characters
characters.empty: There are no sheets in this journal yet. Heroes and companions will earn their pages soon.

world.title: Your world
world.lead: Each tome of your world will have its own voice — the same book, distinct chapters.

discover.title: Join a campaign
discover.lead: Public campaigns from other masters. Step in and take a seat.
discover.empty: No public campaigns are open right now.

new.title: Begin a new book
new.lead: Shape your next chronicle. Every choice here becomes the first page of your book.

placeholders.name: The name of your chronicle
placeholders.customTheme: Describe the theme of your world
placeholders.shortDescription: One line that sums up the campaign
placeholders.premise: How does it all begin? Write your story's premise…
placeholders.customTone: Describe the tone of your table
placeholders.password: Leave blank to require no password

validation.nameMin: The name must be at least 3 characters
validation.nameMax: The name must be at most 120 characters
validation.passwordMin: The password must be at least 6 characters
validation.maxPlayers: Enter a whole number between 1 and 50

cover.hint: JPG, PNG or WEBP · up to 5MB
cover.errorType: Invalid format. Use JPG, PNG or WEBP.
cover.errorSize: The image must be at most 5MB.

attributes.title: Character attributes
attributes.lead: Define the attributes every character in this campaign will use — players, NPCs, allies and monsters alike.
attributes.emptyDescription: Add the first attribute to shape how characters are measured in this campaign.

share.copied: Join link copied to the clipboard.

join.title: Join the campaign
join.notFound: This campaign could not be found.
join.full: This campaign has reached its player limit.

list.title: Factions
list.lead: Kingdoms, orders and houses that shape your world.
list.emptyTitle: The Book of Heraldry is blank
list.emptyDescription: No factions recorded yet. Create the first one and give it a coat of arms or a banner.

new.title: Forge a faction
new.lead: Describe the faction richly — its symbol is created from all of this context.
new.generationNote: On creation, a coat of arms or banner is generated by AI from the context. This may take a few moments.

placeholders.name: The faction's name
placeholders.identity: Culture, aesthetics, clothing, architecture, customs, atmosphere…
placeholders.memberTraits: e.g. often red-haired or blond, tall and slender.
placeholders.recurringElements: e.g. ravens, crescent moon, silver, thorns.
placeholders.symbolPrompt: e.g. a black raven holding a sword over a golden field.

hints.identity: Free-form field for the faction's overall identity.
hints.memberTraits: Will influence characters tied to the faction later.
hints.recurringElements: Symbols and motifs that repeat across the faction.
hints.symbolPrompt: Your basic idea; the AI considers the whole campaign and faction context.

validation.nameMin: The name must be at least 3 characters

detail.generatingHint: This may take a few moments. The page updates automatically.
detail.failed: The symbol could not be generated.
detail.noSymbol: This faction has no symbol yet. Generate a coat of arms or a banner.
detail.pendingHint: A symbol was generated. Approve, reject or request adjustments.
detail.adjustPlaceholder: Describe the adjustments you want (e.g. darker, without the crown)…

participant.title: Participants
participant.lead: Everyone at the table — owner, master and players — and who's online right now.
participant.hubMeta: Owner, master, players and who's online.

character.hubMeta: Create and manage NPCs, creatures and key figures of your story.

list.title: Characters
list.lead: NPCs, creatures and figures shaped by the master.
list.emptyDescription: Create the first NPC, creature or figure of your story.

new.title: Create a character
new.lead: A narrative figure of the campaign — ally, monster or mystery, as the story decides.

detail.adjustHelp: Describe what you want to change. The system will try to preserve the character's identity and apply your changes.
detail.adjustPlaceholder: Describe the changes to the portrait…
detail.adjustExample1: Make him older, with more noble clothing.
detail.adjustExample2: Remove the sword and make the expression wearier.
detail.adjustExample3: Make it less colorful and more realistic.

hints.masterOnly: Only you (the master) can see this.

art.title: Character art direction
art.lead: Define the visual style that guides every character portrait in this campaign.
art.help: These instructions are used as the visual base for all characters in the campaign, unless a character explicitly asks to ignore them.
art.placeholder: e.g. Realistic dark fantasy, cold tones, worn medieval clothing, neutral background, no anime, no vibrant colors…
